reasoning_chain_text:
1. For each school year 2014-15 through 2017-18, find Washington school districts with ELA performance at least 68 percent for all students and all grades.
2. Intersect district sets across all four years and map to counties.
3. From the county context sources, identify which candidate county both borders Idaho and has 2020 population under 300,000.
4. Return the county name only.
original_reasoning_chain: Intersection -> counties {King, Clark, Pierce, Whitman, Thurston, Spokane}
HOP 2 (d=2, Wikipedia filter - nodes 5-6 depend on hop 1):
Node 5: Whitman County borders Idaho and has 2020 population 47,973 (<300,000) -> qualifies
Node 6: Spokane County borders Idaho but has 2020 population 539,339 (>300,000) -> does not qualify
original_ifnal_question: From the Washington school districts that met ELA performance >= 68% for all students, all grades in each year from 2014-15 through 2017-18, which county both borders Idaho and had a 2020 population under 300,000? Return the county name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
